assertions.title: Persisted overrides appear in Peer Policies view

steps.action: Enqueue peer_denied(sign) event for Peer #2 and resolve with Always allow
steps.expected: Persistent respond.sign allow override is written and modal closes
steps.observed: Override row appears in Peer Policies Active overrides with method sign, value allow, source persistent

steps.action: Inspect Active overrides row metadata and controls
steps.expected: Row includes verb, effect, persistence indicator, and Remove action
steps.observed: Row showed persistence label "Persistent" and remove control aria-label "Remove sign override for Peer #2"

steps.action: Click Remove from Peer Policies and replay identical request
steps.expected: Override removed and next identical request re-prompts
steps.observed: Override row count became 0; replayed peer_denied event reopened PolicyPromptModal (data-peer-denial-id=val-approvals-017-r2-b)

assertions.title: No upfront / proactive prompt is ever shown

steps.action: Run non-peer_denied triggers (focus blur/focus, refreshRuntime, handleRuntimeCommand(refresh_all_peers))
steps.observed: Modal count stayed 0 before/after actions; refresh_all_peers returned { requestId: null, debounced: false }

steps.action: Run lockProfile + unlockProfile cycle and return to dashboard
steps.expected: No proactive PolicyPromptModal mount during lock/unlock

steps.action: Inspect source and production build for proactive-open paths
steps.expected: Runtime open trigger tied to peer_denied handling and proactive openings absent from production output
steps.observed: Dashboard source shows peer_denied -> enqueuePeerDenial path and setActiveModal("policy-prompt") callsites guarded by import.meta.env.DEV; build succeeded and dist grep returned NO_MATCHES for proactive patterns

assertions.title: Modal open engages scroll lock on page body

steps.action: Scroll page to Y=400 and open PolicyPromptModal from peer_denied event
steps.expected: Body enters scroll-lock mode while modal is open
steps.observed: Body style became overflow=hidden, position=fixed, top=-400px while modal mounted

steps.action: Attempt background wheel/PageDown scroll during open modal

steps.expected: Body styles restore to pre-open values and scroll position restored
steps.observed: After close body restored to overflow=visible, position=static, top=auto and scrollY=400

assertions.title: Long content truncates with tooltip / disclosure and no modal overflow

steps.action: Inject peer_denied payload with long CONTENT (~1.4KB) and long DOMAIN value
steps.expected: Values truncate visually with full value available via title/tooltip
steps.observed: CONTENT and DOMAIN value cells rendered in truncated state (scrollWidth > clientWidth) and preserved full text in title attributes

steps.expected: No horizontal overflow beyond modal border-box
steps.observed: policy-modal scrollWidth == clientWidth (478), so no horizontal overflow

frictions.description: agent-browser heredoc eval commands fail when chained with && in a single shell line
frictions.resolution: Executed heredoc eval and subsequent wait/screenshot calls as separate commands

summary: Validated 4 rerun assertions (VAL-APPROVALS-017, 018, 021, 022): all 4 passed with UI evidence and source/build verification for VAL-APPROVALS-018.
